documents.body:
# Command R

## ![](cohere.png) Cohere — Command R

## Model Details

Command R is a text generation model.
+ **Model launch date:** Mar 11, 2024
+ **Model EOL date:** N/A
+ **Model lifecycle:** Legacy
+ **Context window:** 128K tokens
+ **Max output tokens:** 4K

| **Input Modalities** | **Output Modalities** | **APIs supported** | **Endpoints supported** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ![Yes](icon-yes.png) Text | ![Yes](icon-yes.png) Text | ![Yes](icon-yes.png) Invoke | ![Yes](icon-yes.png) bedrock-runtime |
| ![No](icon-no.png) Image | ![No](icon-no.png) Image | ![No](icon-no.png) Converse | ![No](icon-no.png) bedrock-mantle |

## Programmatic Access

| **Endpoint** | **Model ID** | **In-Region endpoint URL** | **Geo inference ID** | **Global inference ID** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| bedrock-runtime | cohere.command-r-v1:0 | https://bedrock-runtime.{region}.amazonaws.com | `us.cohere.command-r-v1:0` | N/A |

## Regional Availability

| **Region** | **In-Region** | **Geo** | **Global** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| us-east-1 (N. Virginia) | ![Yes](icon-yes.png) | ![No](icon-no.png) | ![No](icon-no.png) |
| us-west-2 (Oregon) | ![Yes](icon-yes.png) | ![Yes](icon-yes.png) | ![No](icon-no.png) |

## Service Tiers

# Claude Haiku 4.5

## ![](claude.png) Anthropic — Claude Haiku 4.5

## Model Details

Claude Haiku 4.5 is a fast multimodal model.
+ **Model launch date:** Oct 15, 2025
+ **Model EOL date:** N/A
+ **Model lifecycle:** Active
+ **Context window:** 200K tokens
+ **Max output tokens:** 64K
+ **Reasoning:** Supported

| **Input Modalities** | **Output Modalities** | **APIs supported** | **Endpoints supported** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ![Yes](icon-yes.png) Text | ![Yes](icon-yes.png) Text | ![Yes](icon-yes.png) Invoke | ![Yes](icon-yes.png) bedrock-runtime |
| ![Yes](icon-yes.png) Image | ![No](icon-no.png) Image | ![Yes](icon-yes.png) Converse | ![Yes](icon-yes.png) bedrock-mantle |
| ![No](icon-no.png) Audio | ![No](icon-no.png) Embedding | ![Yes](icon-yes.png) Messages |  |

## Capabilities and Features

**Prompt caching**

| **Prompt caching supported** | **Supported TTL** |
| --- | --- |
| Yes | 5 minutes |

## Programmatic Access

| **Endpoint** | **Model ID** | **In-Region endpoint URL** | **Geo inference ID** | **Global inference ID** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `bedrock-runtime` | `anthropic.claude-haiku-4-5-20251001-v1:0` | `https://bedrock-runtime.{region}.amazonaws.com` | `us.anthropic.claude-haiku-4-5-20251001-v1:0` | `global.anthropic.claude-haiku-4-5-20251001-v1:0` |
| `bedrock-mantle` | `anthropic.claude-haiku-4-5` | `https://bedrock-mantle.{region}.api.aws/anthropic/v1/messages` | N/A | N/A |

## Regional Availability

| **Region** | **In-Region** | **Geo** | **Global** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| us-east-1 (N. Virginia) | ![Yes](icon-yes.png) | ![Yes](icon-yes.png) | ![Yes](icon-yes.png) |
| ap-southeast-4 (Melbourne) | ![Yes](icon-yes.png) | ![Yes](icon-yes.png) | ![Yes](icon-yes.png) |

## Service Tiers

# Rerank 3.5

## ![](cohere.png) Cohere — Rerank 3.5

## Model Details

Rerank 3.5 reorders search results.
+ **Model launch date:** Dec 2, 2024
+ **Model EOL date:** N/A
+ **Model lifecycle:** Active
+ **Context window:** 4K tokens

| **Input Modalities** | **Output Modalities** | **APIs supported** | **Endpoints supported** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ![Yes](icon-yes.png) Text | ![Yes](icon-yes.png) Text | ![Yes](icon-yes.png) Invoke | ![Yes](icon-yes.png) bedrock-runtime |
| ![No](icon-no.png) Image | ![No](icon-no.png) Image | ![No](icon-no.png) Converse | ![No](icon-no.png) bedrock-mantle |

## Programmatic Access

| **Endpoint** | **Model ID** | **In-Region endpoint URL** | **Geo inference ID** | **Global inference ID** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| bedrock-runtime | cohere.rerank-v3-5:0 | https://bedrock-runtime.{region}.amazonaws.com | Not supported | Not supported |

## Regional Availability

| **Region** | **In-Region** | **Geo** | **Global** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| us-east-1 (N. Virginia) | ![Yes](icon-yes.png) | ![No](icon-no.png) | ![No](icon-no.png) |

#### [ Rerank API ]
